name: Aisha Okonkwo
summary: 7 years backend engineering. Python and Go. Built real-time trade execution engine at Lagos fintech startup handling 50k req/s. Kafka, PostgreSQL, Redis. Led team of 4. No degree listed.

name: James Whitfield
summary: 6 years at Goldman Sachs and Barclays. Java primary language, some Python. Equity derivatives pricing systems. Low-latency focus. Oxford CS degree. No WebSocket experience listed.

name: Mei-Lin Zhang
summary: 4 years experience. Python expert. Contributed to 3 open source trading libraries. PostgreSQL, MongoDB. Built WebSocket data pipeline for crypto exchange. Currently at early-stage startup.

name: Dmitri Volkov
summary: 8 years. Go and Rust. Kubernetes expert. High-frequency trading infrastructure at prop trading firm. Redis, Kafka, ClickHouse. No fintech regulatory experience noted.

name: Priya Nair
summary: 5 years backend. Python and TypeScript. Payments infrastructure at Razorpay — 100k transactions/day. PostgreSQL, Docker. MBA + CS degree. Strong communication skills noted by referees.

name: Tom Henderson
summary: 10 years. Mostly Java, learning Go. Senior engineer at Google then Meta. Strong system design. No financial domain experience. Kubernetes, Cassandra. FAANG background prominent in CV framing.
